TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrew_James_Allen, title = Andrew_James_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrew_James_Allen} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 7, Andrew James Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Allen htgan na ryax maki letmot. hiya yaba ga qutux klhangan cinbwanan ru 9 kawas Allen ga,aring mqwas ru mzyugi mhtuw telibi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 7, Andrew James Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Allen htgan na ryax maki letmot. hiya yaba ga qutux klhangan cinbwanan ru 9 kawas Allen ga,aring mqwas ru mzyugi mhtuw telibi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*rew *ames~ɕ allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) allen ħtɣan na rjax maki letmot. ħija jaβa ɣa qutux klħaŋan ʦ~ʨinβwanan ru * kawas~ɕ allen ɣa,ariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mzjuɣi mħtuw teliβi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
